title: Cartoon Network Star Creates The Perfect, Spooky Resident Evil Crossover
content: Resident Evil Requiem is considered to be one of the greatest games in the survival horror Capcom series, introducing a new character, Grace Ashcroft, while bringing back series veteran Leon Kennedy.
author: ComicBook

title: GlobalComix Adds Manga From Yuri Hub
content: Digital reading and distribution platform GlobalComix announced on Wednesday that it is adding the following manga from the Yuri Hub yuri manga service: Ever-cheerful, caring-to-a-fault Tsumugi Hina grows increasingly worried about one of her repeat customers.
author: ANN

title: One of Anime’s Biggest Isekai Confirms Theatrical Return
content: The isekai genre has become a force to be reckoned with in the anime industry, and there is one franchise that has been creating new stories since it first landed in 2002. Initially releasing stories as a novel series, the isekai in question would branch out into light novels, video games, and of course, anime…
author: ComicBook

title: Over Requiemz Switch Game Launches in West on August 20
content: Aksys Games describes the story: In a dark reimagining of the classic tale, high school student Yuhiru is swept up in a mysterious tornado and finds herself lost in Oz. There, she is unjustly sentenced to death and ordered to travel with four convicts on death row and their supervisor. Their goal?
author: ANN

title: Comitia Dōjinshi Convention's Chair Kimihiko Nakamura Dies
content: A private funeral service attended only by close relatives will be held, in accordance to Nakamura's wishes. Also in accordance to his wishes, the Comitia Executive Committee plans to hold a public memorial service at a later date.
author: ANN

title: A New Looney Tunes Anime Has Been Confirmed (And The First Trailer Is Here)
content: Warner Bros hasn’t been shy when it comes to confirming their commitment to anime in recent years. With the entertainment studio set to merge with Paramount/Skydance, fans are left to wonder what the future holds for the WB when it comes to entering this medium.
author: ComicBook

title: “Episode of the Year”: Spring 2026’s Magical Anime Becomes a Visual Marvel In Its Latest Episode
content: As the spring season of 2026 progresses, ongoing anime are releasing their latest episodes as well, and one of the best series this season might have just delivered the best-looking anime episode of the year, or so fans are calling it online.
author: ComicBook

title: 5 Things That Still Make No Sense About Godzilla
content: In 1954, filmmaker Ishirō Honda and Toho debuted the first Godzilla film, a dark monster movie about Japan grappling with its post-war identity and the shadow of the nuclear attacks that ended World War II, all wrapped up in an impressive special effects display.
author: ComicBook

title: A New Dawn, The Obsessed, Peleliu, We Are Aliens, More Films to Play at Annecy
content: "Annecy Presents," one of the festival's non-competitive sections, will feature the following Japanese films: CHIMNEY TOWN: Frozen in Time ( Entotsu-chō no Poupelle ~Yakusoku no Tokeidai~ ) anime film , Paris ni Saku Étoile ( L'étoile de Paris en fleur or Étoile Blossoming in Paris) original anime film , The…
author: ANN

title: New Hokuto no Ken -Fist of the North Star- Anime Casts Jirō Saitō
content: The staff for Hokuto no Ken -Fist of the North Star- , the new anime of Tetsuo Hara 's landmark manga Fist of the North Star ( Hokuto no Ken ), announced on Wednesday that voice actor Jirō Saitō is joining the anime's cast as Mad Sarge, GOLAN's deputy leader.
author: ANN
